company.name: AnaMine
company.description: Global partner for mining, industrial chemicals, procurement, and digital transformation solutions.

offices.address: Condominio Belas Business Park, Etapa V, Edificio Cuanza Sul, 6° Piso, Talatona Municipality, Luanda, Angola

services.title: Supply Chain & Procurement Consultancy
services.shortDesc: End-to-end supply chain maturity assessment, procurement strategy, contract management, and logistics optimization.

services.title: Digital Transformation
services.shortDesc: IT maturity assessments, e-sourcing platforms, ERP implementation, blockchain solutions, and dashboard systems.

services.title: Industrial Sourcing
services.shortDesc: Global procurement of minerals, mining chemicals, and industrial consumables.

industries.title: Mining
industries.description: Core industry focus. Comprehensive mining solutions including chemicals, consumables, and digital tools.

industries.title: Automotive
industries.description: 40+ years expertise in Turkey's automotive sector, expanding into Angola and African markets.

industries.title: Oil & Gas
industries.description: 40+ years experience in oil & gas procurement and supply chain in Turkey.

seo.defaultTitle: AnaMine | Mining, Industrial Chemicals & Digital Transformation
